meta.title: GEONYX | Food, Beverage, Pharma & Hygiene – Seamless Industrial Floors
meta.description: GEONYX designs seamless mineral floor systems for the food & beverage industry, pharmaceuticals and hygienic production – resistant to chemicals, steam, hot water, biofilm and aggressive cleaning agents. Compatible with HACCP, IFS, BRC and GMP standards.

tender.text: Floors and associated hydro- and chemical-protective systems in production, washing, packaging, refrigeration, storage and kitchen zones shall be executed with mineral geopolymer systems of the GEONYX type or equivalent, combining ARMOR / CHEM / HYDRO / THERM / REPAIR according to hygienic and technological risk. The systems shall provide a seamless or minimally jointed surface, compatibility with the disinfectants used, controlled slip resistance, and shall comply with the applicable HACCP, IFS, BRC and pharma/GMP requirements of the client.

hero.description: In food, beverage and pharma production the floor is part of product safety. GEONYX provides mineral, seamless and easy-to-clean surfaces resistant to hot water, steam and chemicals, compatible with HACCP and pharma standards.

scope.title: SCOPE
scope.z1: Dairy processing plants and cheese factories
scope.z3: Soft drink and bottled water plants
scope.z9: Packaging and logistics zones with refrigeration
scope.z10: Wet rooms, wash-down areas and CIP/COP zones

manifesto.body: Every food safety programme or pharmaceutical production relies on three things: surfaces with no hidden areas, predictable cleaning and contamination risk control. If the floor is peeling, collects water in joints, is slippery or reacts with cleaning agents, neither the HACCP plan nor cleaning protocols can compensate. GEONYX replaces 'paint on concrete' with a monolithic mineral system.

b1.title: FISH, SALT, BLOOD AND THERMAL SHOCK
b1.problem: Fish processing facilities represent the 'hell scenario' for floors – a combination of salt water, blood, fat, ice, hot water and steam. Standard coatings crack under thermal shock; joints retain biofilm.
b1.solution: GEONYX CHEM + HYDRO builds a seamless, chemically resistant mineral system with controlled anti-slip texture. The floor is designed to absorb thermal cycles – from ice zones to hot wash-down.

b2.title: FAT, BLOOD AND STEAM
b2.problem: In meat plants and dairies the floor absorbs blood, fat, milk, brine and strong alkaline/acid cleaning agents. Hot water and steam combine with impact from trolleys and stainless tables.
b2.solution: GEONYX CHEM provides a mineral system resistant to organic acids, alkaline cleaning agents and fats. ARMOR gives the required mechanical strength for traffic, while HYDRO is used in permanently wet zones.

b3.title: SUGAR, FOAM AND BROKEN GLASS
b3.problem: In beverage plants floors are constantly wet – water, syrups, sugar solutions, foam, CIP solutions. Sugar makes the floor sticky and accelerates deterioration. Broken glass cuts standard coatings.
b3.solution: GEONYX CHEM + HYDRO forms a dense surface on which syrups stay 'on top'. ARMOR provides impact and traffic resistance. Channel details are executed without sharp edges.

b4.title: FLOUR, DUST AND THERMAL SHOCK
b4.problem: In bakeries flour is everywhere and becomes a sticky mass when wet. Hot trolleys from ovens create local thermal shock. Coatings darken and flake off.
b4.solution: GEONYX ARMOR + THERM creates a surface resistant to thermal shock. The structure is designed so that flour does not penetrate pores. HYDRO is added in wet-cleaning zones.

b5.title: OILS, ALCOHOLS AND SOLVENTS
b5.problem: Cosmetics production involves essential oils and alcohols that attack standard resins. Pharma-grade hygiene and a presentable appearance are required for inspections.
b5.solution: GEONYX CHEM offers a mineral matrix that does not swell on contact with fluids. ARMOR guarantees stability, and HYDRO protects wet-cleaning zones. The surface remains visually clean.

b6.title: AGGRESSIVE CLEANING AGENTS
b6.problem: In detergent production concentrated components are highly aggressive. Spills and rinses can quickly destroy ordinary concrete.
b6.solution: GEONYX CHEM is developed for resistance to strong alkalis and acids. ARMOR provides strength for heavy vessels, and HYDRO protects against penetration. A floor that withstands your own products.

b7.title: CLEAN ZONES AND PHARMA PROCESSES
b7.problem: In clean rooms and pharma production the floor must be smooth, joint-free and easy to validate. Any crack is a contamination risk.
b7.solution: GEONYX CHEM + HYDRO provide a seamless surface compatible with pharma disinfectants. ARMOR gives stability for equipment. Details are executed following pharma logic – radii, no pockets.

b8.title: BUTCHER AND FISH COUNTERS
b8.problem: In supermarket butcher sections there is water, blood, fat and traffic. Tile joints darken and fill with biofilm, and slipping is a risk.
b8.solution: GEONYX CHEM replaces tiles with a monolithic mineral system – no joints, with anti-slip. ARMOR handles traffic from pallet lifters, and REPAIR allows fast repairs.

b9.title: SCHOOL AND HOSPITAL KITCHENS
b9.problem: Public kitchens have moisture, hot water and fats. Tiles and standard paints quickly deteriorate and become difficult to clean.
b9.solution: GEONYX CHEM + HYDRO offers a non-slip and easy-to-clean surface. ARMOR provides resistance to trolleys, and REPAIR allows repairs during holiday periods.

b10.title: REFRIGERATION AND SHOCK-FREEZING CHAMBERS
b10.problem: In chambers (-25°C) joints freeze and are destroyed by traffic. Repairs are difficult at low temperatures.
b10.solution: GEONYX ARMOR + HYDRO offers a monolithic system resistant to thermal shock. REPAIR allows interventions within short windows.

roi.title: INVESTMENT AUDIT
roi.r1epoxy: Joints and transitions, risk of peeling
roi.r2param: Resistance to hot water and steam

applications.title: WHERE IT IS USED
applications.subtitle: All typical 'hall + machines + traffic + pallets' scenarios – from logistics centres and factories to rail depots and data centres.
applications.a1desc: Chemical and lactic acid, water and hygiene.
applications.a2desc: Blood, fat, hot water and heavy cleaning.
applications.a3desc: Sugar, syrups, glass and CIP systems.
applications.a4desc: Flour, heat from ovens and mechanical traffic.
applications.a5desc: Sterile environments, easy cleaning and disinfection.
applications.a8desc: Fresh food zones and intensive customer traffic.

systems.title: GEONYX SYSTEM SELECTION
systems.subtitle: System selection depends on the combination of mechanical load, chemical aggression and requirements for temperature, ESD and hygiene. GEONYX configures solutions by zone – instead of 'one coating for all'.
systems.s1desc: Chemically resistant systems for zones with aggressive acids, alkalis and cleaning agents.
systems.s2desc: Watertight and easy-to-clean systems for wet production and wash-down areas.
systems.s3desc: High-strength flooring for storage and logistics zones with intensive traffic.
systems.s4desc: Thermally resistant systems for zones with ovens, shock-freezing and steam.
systems.s5desc: Fast repair solutions for restoring compromised areas.

offer.title: OFFER PACKAGE
offer.description: For food, pharma and hygiene facilities GEONYX prepares a complete package for internal approval and auditing organisations.
offer.qualityDesc: All documents comply with current Eurocodes and standards.
offer.i2: Technical specifications for systems by zone
offer.i3: Compatibility with HACCP, IFS, BRC, GMP
offer.i4: Details for joints, drains and transitions

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: ARE GEONYX SYSTEMS COMPATIBLE WITH OUR CLEANING AND DISINFECTING AGENTS?
faq.a1: Yes. During the audit phase we collect a list of the chemicals and concentrates used and select a CHEM configuration that can withstand them long-term.
faq.q2: CAN REPAIRS BE CARRIED OUT WITHOUT STOPPING THE ENTIRE PRODUCTION?
faq.a2: In most cases – yes. We work in phases, zone by zone, with night and weekend windows.
faq.q3: WHAT LEVEL OF SLIP RESISTANCE CAN WE EXPECT IN WET CONDITIONS?
faq.a3: The texture and slip-resistance class are set at project stage, according to the type of processes and safety requirements.

cta.title: COMPREHENSIVE SITE ZONING
cta.description: Every facility has specific risks. We integrate 6 specialised matrices into one system: from mechanics, chemistry and thermal shock, to waterproofing, anti-static and architecture. One technology that guarantees 100% coverage of needs and full compatibility.
